calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Appellant Charles gadsden Kinney in Propria Persona. Shelby King appeared for the responded via Zoom.

The parties presented oral argument and the matter was taken under submission.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Cross Complaint Against State Bar, Ftb And Cjc
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SHELBY KING, Esq. of Office of General Counsel of the State Bar of California (tel: 213-765-1744) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CHARLES KINNEY' Mtn For Leave To File Cross Complaint Against State Bar, Ftb And Cjc.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's "motion for leave to file cross-complaint against State Bar, FTB, and CJC" is denied. This action was fully resolved months ago by the court's orders. No cause of action is pending against defendant. (CCP 428.10.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The State Bar To Comply And Pay Damages; Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SHELBY KING, Esq. of Office of General Counsel - State Bar of California (tel: 213-765-1744) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CHARLES KINNEY's Motion To Compel The State Bar To Comply And Pay Damages.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's "motion to compel the State Bar to comply and pay damages" is denied. The motion is based on the notion that liens the State Bar recorded against defendant's property in Alameda County have not been removed. (Id. at 1:25-2:2.) But the Bar declares under penalty of perjury that the Alameda County liens have been removed "and no other liens have been recorded in any other county." (King Dec. 1:14-19, 4:10-6:22 see also Opp. 2:6-9.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate The 2018 Cost Order Issued To The State Bar Of California
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Raul Duran, Esq. and Shelby King, Esq. 415-538-2517 for Plaintiff the State Bar of California.
Charles Gadsen Kinney 510-393-9038 Defendant in Pro Per.

Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CHARLES KINNEY'S Motion To Vacate The 2018 Cost Order Issued To The State Bar Of California.

The motion is granted based on plaintiff's notice of non-opposition. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
